prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to a decision made by Central Bedfordshire Council regarding school admission arrangements, which applies specifically to England. It does not affect Scotland, as education governance is devolved to the Scottish Government, and different policies and regulations are in place.
